stance: Diplomatic yet cautious negotiator with a keen sense for profit and survival in
vita: Born on distant Vor'Tak Prime, I was raised amid interstellar trade routes. My people value negotin...
portrait_prompt: A dignified Vor'Tak Trader stands poised before a holographic display of star maps and trading charts; his eyes reflect wisdom honed by countless negotiations across the stars, hands steady as he adjusts an ancient-looking astrolabe that doubles as navigation equipment. His attire is practical yet elegant—a mix of traditional Vor'Tak textiles with futuristic enhancements.
